news.headline: AMD expects export control may result in charges up to $800m, the US export control applies to company’s MI308 products.

news.summary: Crowne Plaza by IHG, a top-tier hotel brand globally, has introduced innovative offerings and guest experiences aimed at promoting meaningful connections among business travelers. The unveiling of these new initiatives took place in Atlanta on April 16, 2025. As a pioneer in the blended travel sector, Crowne Plaza is enhancing its services to emphasize the importance of intentional togetherness. This strategic move is expected to cater to the needs of modern business travelers who prioritize quality interactions during their stay.
news.headline: Crowne Plaza launches "Bring Your Bestie" promotion for work and play, encouraging togetherness - April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Cohere Health, a prominent provider of clinical intelligence solutions for health plans, has recently welcomed Dr. Paul to their Medical Advisory Board. Dr. Paul, an accomplished spine surgeon, brings a wealth of experience that will further strengthen and expand Cohere Health's AI-powered solutions. This addition is part of Cohere Health's strategic efforts to enhance their offerings. The company's focus on utilizing advanced technology is evident, with the date of this announcement being April 16, 2025. This move signifies Cohere Health's commitment to leveraging expertise in the field, with Dr. Paul set to play a crucial role in shaping the future of clinical intelligence solutions.
news.headline: Cohere Health appoints Dr. Paul Johnson to its Medical Advisory Board to boost AI clinical intelligence solutions.

news.summary: Amsterdam, April 16, 2025 - OCI Global (Euronext: OCI) has officially announced that there will be an extraordinary cash distribution of USD 4.74 per share, totaling USD 1.0 billion, to be paid around May 7, 2025. The equivalent Euro amount for this distribution is...
news.headline: OCI Global will pay an extraordinary cash distribution of USD 4.74 per share (totaling USD 1.0 billion) on May 7, 2025. Euro equivalent details for the distribution will also be provided.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in New York, The House of Rémy Martin announced a special partnership with acclaimed artist Anish Kapoor. This collaboration showcases a limited-edition Rémy Martin XO decanter and an exclusive artwork. The collection is a one-of-a-kind project aimed at combining art and luxury.
news.headline: Rémy Martin XO collaborates with Anish Kapoor on limited edition decanter and artwork, unveiled in New York.

news.summary: A new automated incentives feature has been introduced by Wildfire Systems Inc. in their white-label rewards platform, aimed at assisting businesses in boosting engagement and revenue without requiring any technical expertise. This innovation was unveiled in San Diego on April 16, 2025. Wildfire Systems Inc. is a leading financial technology platform that specializes in enhancing loyalty and reward programs for businesses.
news.headline: Wildfire Systems introduces new incentives feature in loyalty program to boost engagement and revenue.

news.summary: In an announcement made in Atlanta on April 16, 2025, Torres, a seasoned professional with experience at top companies like Goldman Sachs, Ulu Ventures, Uber, and Google, has joined Open Opportunity Fund. This venture capital firm specializes in investing in B2B software and aims to drive operational scale and strategic growth for its portfolio companies. Torres' expertise in investment and technology will be instrumental in this endeavor, bringing valuable experience to the table. This move signifies a strategic push towards further enhancing the growth and performance of the fund's investments.
news.headline: Nancy Torres appointed as Senior VP at Open Opportunity Fund, bringing expertise from prestigious firms to drive growth.

news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Powercast Corporation, a leading provider of wireless charging solutions, has received the prestigious honor of being named a Best Place to Work in 2025 for the second consecutive year by the Business Intelligence Group. This recognition underscores Powercast's commitment to creating a positive work environment.
news.headline: Powercast, a wireless charging solutions provider, named a 2025 Best Place to Work for 2nd year by Business Intelligence Group.

news.summary: A recent study by Burford Capital reveals that approximately 80% of in-house lawyers believe their companies are not maximizing their potential value. The research specifically focuses on patent monetization as a strategy for companies to capitalize on their intellectual property. The study was conducted in New York and the findings were released on April 16, 2025. Burford Capital is a prominent global finance and asset management firm specializing in legal matters.
news.headline: Burford Capital research finds 8 in 10 in-house lawyers say companies aren't fully capitalizing on patent value.

news.summary: Sky Organics, a prominent provider of natural and certified organic personal care items, has introduced two new certified organic products aimed at nourishing curls and supporting scalp health. These products are now accessible at Walmart locations throughout the country. The company, based in Boca Raton, Florida, made the announcement on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Sky Organics launches 2 new certified organic hair products for curls and scalp health, now at Walmart nationwide.

news.summary: Introducing a New Generation of Aromatherapy with Luxury Scents in New York. On April 16, 2025, ripple⁺ Home revealed its latest REED Diffuser collection aimed at transforming home fragrances. The brand is committed to reshaping aromatherapy and creating a luxurious ambiance.
news.headline: ripple⁺ Home launches REED, its first home Scent Diffuser collection, offering luxury scents for aromatherapy.

news.summary: Experience the revolutionary Method 360 ANC true wireless earbuds for an exclusive introductory price of just $99 in Park City, Utah. Skullcandy and Bose have joined forces to launch this groundbreaking product designed to deliver top-notch audio quality. This partnership aims to redefine personal audio by offering a premium listening experience.
news.headline: Skullcandy's new Method 360 ANC earbuds, with premium sound by Bose, available at $99 introductory price.

news.summary: The KT Soothe line, which consists of the KT Tape Soothe and KT Health Soothe Magnesium Cream, is now available. These products are infused with lavender essential oils and magnesium for pain relief and muscle recovery. Developed by KT, a leading provider of kinesiology tape and sports recovery solutions, this line aims to provide innovative solutions for athletes and individuals in need of relief. The products offer a unique blend of ingredients aimed at enhancing recovery and reducing discomfort. The line was launched on April 16, 2025, in American Fork, Utah.
news.headline: KT introduces new lavender products for recovery: KT Tape Soothe & KT Health Soothe Magnesium Cream for pain relief and muscle recovery.

news.summary: In Troy, Maine on April 16, 2025, Syncarpha Capital, a company headquartered in New York specializing in solar and storage projects, has successfully obtained Permission to Operate (PTO) from Central Maine Power (CMP) for its latest endeavor, the community solar initiative known as Troy Solar I. This milestone signifies the completion and approval of the project, furthering Syncarpha Capital’s commitment to sustainable energy solutions and marking a significant step towards boosting the region's renewable energy capacity.
news.headline: Syncarpha Capital's Troy Solar I in Maine receives Permission to Operate from CMP, marking a milestone in community solar.

news.summary: Luxury goods giant LVMH and automotive company Nissan are among the international clients utilizing Olyzon's AI-driven advertising technology to address persistent inefficiencies hindering investments in Connected TV (CTV). CEO Jules Minvielle has relocated to New York, while Zach Sorscher has been named the new Senior Vice President of Sales. The transition signals a strategic move to capitalize on the global market demand for advanced CTV solutions.
news.headline: Olyzon's AI-native ad tech makes waves in US with LVMH & Nissan as global clients. CEO relocates to NY, SVP appointed.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established between a renowned nonprofit organization, Truth Initiative, and an innovative provider of nicotine replacement therapy solutions. This partnership aims to merge a successful behavioral program with a cutting-edge nicotine replacement therapy to assist individuals in overcoming nicotine addiction. The initiative, announced in Washington on April 16, 2025, is set to empower a new generation by offering them comprehensive tools to break free from this addiction. This venture combines the expertise of established programs with emerging solutions, showcasing a holistic approach towards addressing nicotine addiction.
news.headline: Truth Initiative partners with Blip to help young adults quit nicotine, using behavioral program and therapy.

news.summary: A summit titled the ISG Future Workplace Summit in Stamford, Conn., will bring together industry leaders and ISG experts to delve into discussions about artificial intelligence (AI), productivity, and navigating through economic uncertainty. The event aims to cover important topics regarding the impact of AI on the workplace and strategies for managing productivity in the face of uncertain economic conditions. Stay tuned to gain insights and knowledge from prominent figures in the industry as they share their expertise on these critical issues.
news.headline: ISG Future Workplace Summit in Stamford, Conn will focus on AI and productivity amid economic uncertainty.

news.summary: In Seongnam, South Korea, PODO Therapeutics is set to present two poster presentations at the AACR Annual Meeting 2025. The company will showcase its innovative platform during the event.
news.headline: PODO Therapeutics introduces predictive platform at AACR 2025 for immuno-oncology and radiation sensitivity. Two posters to be showcased.

news.summary: According to recent data, the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.5%, with over 10 million people currently out of work. The government has announced a new stimulus package worth $50 billion to support businesses and individuals affected by the economic downturn. Additionally, it has been reported that the national GDP has decreased by 3.2% in the last quarter. Experts are predicting that it may take several years for the economy to fully recover from the impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: Abnormal Security rebrands to Abnormal AI; reverts to original name to safeguard against cybercrime with AI.

news.summary: A new initiative has been launched to aid millions of Americans managing high blood pressure. Smart Meter, a remote patient monitoring solutions provider, has teamed up with Kura Care, an AI-driven patient engagement company. Together, they have introduced a personalized blood pressure program that aims to support patients better. The program utilizes Smart Meter's iBloodPressure technology, which is cellular-connected. This collaboration seeks to empower patients and improve care team assistance in tackling high blood pressure.
news.headline: Smart Meter and Kura Care team up to empower 119M Americans with a personalized blood pressure program.

news.summary: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, the Alliance for Open Media (AOMedia) revealed that Spatial9, an AI-driven immersive audio platform known for its premium immersive mix production, has become a member. By joining AOMedia, Spatial9 will work alongside the Alliance’s network of internet and media technology companies to promote universal standards for innovative video, audio, and multimedia technologies globally. This partnership signifies a significant development, with Spatial9 bringing its expertise to collaborate on pioneering advancements in digital content creation.
news.headline: Spatial9 has joined the Alliance for Open Media, an AI-powered immersive audio platform aiming to develop open standards alongside internet and media tech companies.

news.summary: In São Paulo, the Bradesco Foundation, the leading private social investment initiative in Brazil, has joined forces with ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) to revamp digital education operations and services throughout Brazil via the ABC Project. This collaborative effort aims to bolster operational governance and provide increased efficiency, flexibility, and security to improve the overall experience for teachers, administrative personnel, and students. The annual investment for this project amounts to R$1 million.
news.headline: Bradesco Foundation and ServiceNow enhance education services in Brazil with the ABC Project, investing R$1 annually.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Trustwise, an AI trust and optimization company, has partnered with researchers from New York University (NYU) to introduce an innovative strategy for enhancing AI performance in enterprises. This collaborative effort has resulted in a method that intelligently manages cost, speed, and reliability to enable businesses to implement AI systems that are more efficient and effective. The findings, outlined in a technical paper, highlight a groundbreaking approach to optimizing AI deployment.
news.headline: Trustwise & NYU team up for AI advancement, aims to improve enterprise AI efficiency and effectiveness.

news.summary: A tech company in San Francisco, Assort Health, revealed a fresh round of institutional financing co-led by First Round Capital and Chemistry, alongside previous investor Quiet Capital. This boosts Assort Health's total funding to $26 million. Other key investors Four Acres, Tau Ventures, and various prominent angel investors also supported the initiative. Assort Health offers AI solutions specialized in managing patient calls and aims to enhance healthcare services.
news.headline: Assort Health secures $26M in funding from investors including First Round Capital and Chemistry, raising total capital to $26M.

news.summary: A financial company called Glider, which specializes in creating automated onchain investment portfolios, has recently secured $4 million in strategic funding. The funding round was led by a16z CSX, with notable participation from Coinbase Ventures, Uniswap Ventures, First Commit, Selini Capital, GSR, Generative Ventures, Pivot Global, and MoonPay Ventures. Additionally, Glider has disclosed its involvement in the a16z Crypto Startup Accelerator ("CSX") 04 Spring Cohort in San Francisco.
news.headline: Glider secures $4M funding from a16z CSX, Coinbase Ventures for crypto portfolio management. Joined a16z CSX Accelerator.

news.summary: In Chicago, Fast Accounting (TOKYO: 5588) introduced "Deep Dean," an AI model aiming to revolutionize accounting, tax, and finance management for businesses. Developed with a large language model (LLM), Deep Dean exceeds USCPA exam standards, surpassing general AI models like GPT-4o in specialized functions. This AI innovation signifies a groundbreaking shift in automation within the accounting sector.
news.headline: Fast Accounting unveils "Deep Dean," AI model (LLM) revolutionizing finance ops, outperforming with USCPA standards.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company CallRail has introduced a Marketing Development Fund (MDF), aimed at offering financial and strategic assistance for co-branded marketing projects within its Agency Partner Program. The initiative highlights CallRail's dedication to aiding in the advancement and triumph of its 7,000+ Agency partners. The MDF program is structured to aid agencies in implementing successful co-marketing strategies, emphasizing collaborative growth and success within the company's extensive network.
news.headline: CallRail introduces Marketing Development Fund offering financial & strategic aid to agency partners, prioritizing mutual growth & success.

news.summary: A company based in Austin, Texas, SolarWinds Corporation, known for providing observability and IT management software, confirmed the completion of its acquisition by Turn/River Capital. The deal, valued at roughly $4.4 billion, involved stockholders of SolarWinds receiving $18.50 per share in cash. Following the finalization of the acquisition, SolarWinds common stock has stopped trading, and the organization is no longer listed on the New York Stock Exchange.
news.headline: Turn/River buys SolarWinds for $4.4B; stockholders get $18.50/share in cash; SolarWinds no longer publicly traded.

news.summary: A new technology, AVX ONE, is now available to help organizations effectively manage certificates and crypto infrastructure despite their decreasing lifespans. This tool enables precise and agile management of these elements, ensuring companies can keep up with the fast-paced changes in the industry.
news.headline: AppViewX wins Vendor Vision Award at RSA Conference 2025 for AVX ONE, helping manage certificates with precision and agility as their lifespans shorten.

news.summary: Iselin, N.J.--In addition to complying with PAD Level 2, 1Kosmos also adheres to the most stringent security and compliance benchmarks, such as NIST 800-63-3, FIDO2, ISO 27001, and SOC2.
news.headline: 1Kosmos obtains perfect score in Level 2 Biometric PAD Certification, meeting highest security standards such as NIST 800-63-3, FIDO2, ISO 27001, SOC2.

news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee, Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM), the leading paper company globally, revealed that Jean-Michel Ribiéras, the current chairman and CEO, will retire on December 31. John Sims, the current senior vice president and CFO, has been appointed as the new chief operating officer by the board of directors, starting on May 1. In his new role, Sims will oversee commercial and operational aspects while Ribiéras will retain responsibilities for corporate functions until his retirement.
news.headline: Sylvamo CEO Ribiéras to retire; CFO Sims named COO, effective May 1. Ribiéras to step down Dec. 31. #SLVM #TheWorldsPaperCo

news.summary: A new tool called Project Hub Pro App has been released by Quickbase, the AI-powered operations platform. This tool is designed for the construction industry and aims to provide improved visibility for general and specialty contractors. Project Hub offers a comprehensive view of project data from beginning to end, allowing stakeholders to make informed decisions and mitigate risks. Users can customize dashboards and workflows to suit their specific needs. This announcement comes as Quickbase continues to innovate and support project management in the industry.
news.headline: Quickbase launches Project Hub Pro App for construction projects, offering real-time visibility and control for contractors.

news.summary: Orbia Advance Corporation recently welcomed U.S. Senator Tammy Baldwin to unveil the expansion of its custom electrolyte production facility in Madison, Wisconsin. This project, funded by an $8.4 million U.S. Department of Defense contract secured by Senator Baldwin, aims to enhance the national lithium-ion battery supply chain. The inauguration took place on Friday, March 28, as part of Fluor & Energy Materials business by Orbia (BMV: ORBIA).
news.headline: U.S. Senator Tammy Baldwin inaugurates Orbia's new custom electrolyte facility in Wisconsin, funded by an $8.4M Department of Defense contract.

news.summary: Newmont has wrapped up its non-core divestiture program by selling off Akyem and Porcupine. This move marks the completion of the company's strategy to streamline its operations. A total of $X amount was generated from the sale of these assets, further strengthening Newmont's financial position. The divestiture program aimed to focus on core operations and optimize the company's portfolio. This sale aligns with Newmont's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and prioritizing profitable growth opportunities.
news.headline: Newmont sells Akyem and Porcupine as part of non-core divestiture program, completing its strategy.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, DoiT, a prominent company in enterprise-level FinOps and cloud intelligence, has introduced DoiT CloudFlow, a robust automation action engine as part of the DoiT Cloud Intelligence™ platform. This AI-driven technology, which requires no coding, aims to simplify cloud management by automating actions based on FinOps suggestions such as adjusting workload sizes, transferring workloads, optimizing resource schedules, tagging assets, and other tasks. By implementing DoiT CloudFlow, users can eliminate the need for manual review and execution of cost and architecture-related decisions, enhancing operational efficiency.
news.headline: DoiT launches no-code FinOps automation platform, CloudFlow, to streamline cloud management. AI-powered to automate actions on FinOps recommendations for rightsizing, migrating workloads, scheduling resources, tagging assets, and more. Allows users to cut costs and enforce governance efficiently.

news.summary: Lyten, a company specializing in supermaterial applications and a prominent player in lithium-sulfur batteries worldwide, revealed its successful production of the first battery-grade lithium-metal foil in the United States. This achievement utilized lithium alloys and lithium-metal sourced domestically. With a fully localized sulfur cathode supply chain already in place, Lyten is now focusing on localizing the supply chain for its lithium-metal anode. This move aims to establish a resilient and tariff-free battery supply chain in the U.S.
news.headline: Lyten starts US production of lithium-metal foil for batteries, completing a fully localized supply chain, boosting resilience.

news.summary: An announcement was made by Ideal Living, the creator of AirDoctor and AquaTru, in Los Angeles today, highlighting their significant progress in 2024 and 2025. Their achievements encompassed various areas such as expanding into new commercial markets, introducing several new products, promoting community welfare, winning awards, and obtaining NSF certification for eliminating microplastics from drinking water. Throughout 2024, Ideal Living's dedication to innovation and evidence-based outcomes was evident through the launch of numerous products.
news.headline: Ideal Living celebrates successful 2024 into 2025 with commercial expansion, product launches, and awards; NSF certification for microplastics removal from tap water.

news.summary: GeneDx, a company featured in the IBD 50 list, has announced a significant acquisition of Fabric Genomics, a privately held company specializing in AI-powered genomics. The deal involves GeneDx investing up to $51 million for this takeover. The collaboration between the two companies is aimed at advancing research and development in the field of genomics using artificial intelligence technologies. The acquisition emphasizes GeneDx's strategic move to strengthen its position in the industry.
news.headline: GeneDx to acquire Fabric Genomics for $51 million, leveraging AI technology in genomics.

news.summary: Travelers, an insurer listed on the Dow Jones, exceeded Q1 earnings expectations despite incurring significant losses from the California wildfires. The company's strong performance was reported early Wednesday, showcasing resilience in the face of adversity. The insurer's ability to overcome the challenges posed by the wildfires and still deliver exceptional results demonstrates their robust financial standing. The specific figures of the earnings beat and the extent of losses from the wildfires were not provided in the news piece.
news.headline: Travelers, a Dow Jones insurer, exceeds Q1 earnings expectations despite significant losses from California wildfires.

news.summary: On Wednesday, Tesla stock dropped following reports that Trump-imposed tariffs have caused the electric vehicle company to temporarily halt shipments of components. This news raises concerns about the potential delay in Tesla's robotaxi rollout. The impact of these tariffs on the company's operations and plans is being closely watched by investors and analysts. The situation has highlighted the significance of the ongoing trade tensions and their direct implications on major corporations like Tesla.
news.headline: Tesla stock declined due to Trump tariffs pausing component shipments; affecting robotaxi rollout. Source: Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Cybersecurity stocks, including CrowdStrike, are proving to be resilient amidst a technology sector downturn due to Trump tariffs. CrowdStrike is leading the way in the rebound of cybersecurity stocks.
news.headline: Cybersecurity stocks bounce back amid tech downturn due to Trump tariffs; CrowdStrike leads the rebound.

news.summary: Early on Wednesday, Abbott's stock experienced a decrease following the company's report of lower-than-expected first-quarter sales. Despite this, the profit exceeded expectations. The market response to the news led to a slip in Abbott Laboratories' stock.
news.headline: Abbott Labs' stock dropped despite exceeding profit expectations, with light first-quarter sales.

news.summary: The 2025 Paytronix Loyalty Report indicates that while loyalty check sizes are increasing in restaurants and convenience stores, flat check sizes are also common. The report suggests utilizing AI-enhanced data analytics, behavior feedback, gamification, AR, and mobile loyalty tools to enhance engagement and boost loyalty spending. The report emphasizes understanding that loyalty check size measures per-visit spending among loyalty members, not overall average order value (AOV). While loyalty check sizes are growing, they are not uniform, with figures like 50% for FSRs, 44% for QSRs, and 31% for convenience stores. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Paytronix Loyalty Report shows rising loyalty check sizes, but not universal growth; recommends AI, feedback, AR, mobile tools for increase. Check sizes growing in 50% FSRs, 44% QSRs, and 31%...

news.summary: Devo Technology conducted a survey on alert management in security operation centers (SOCs), urging for a transition to an Alertless SOC due to current challenges. The study revealed key issues: 83% of analysts are overwhelmed by alert volume, false positives, and lack of context; 85% spend significant time gathering evidence, and 84% reported duplicated investigations monthly. Specifically, 60% found repeated investigations weekly. The alert-centric system duplicates work and limits efficiency. Analysts often reactively work due to underperforming tools. Transitioning to an Alertless SOC is crucial for resolving these challenges.
news.headline: Devo Technology survey finds 84% of SOC analysts investigate same incidents multiple times due to alert-centric model.
The second round of Iran-US nuclear talks to be held in Rome on Saturday with Omani mediations - Iran's State Media.

news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, DuPont is set to exhibit its cutting-edge products featuring silver nanowire technologies at Electronics Manufacturing Korea (EMK) and Automotive World Korea (AWK) exhibitions from April 16 to 18. The showcase will be held in Hall D, Booth A31. DuPont's innovative offerings will be on display, highlighting the company's commitment to technological advancements.
news.headline: DuPont introduces silver nanowire products in South Korea at exhibitions, showcasing tech in Hall D, Booth A31.

news.summary: In New York on April 16, 2025, IEX has revealed its upcoming introduction of IEX Options scheduled for the conclusion of the first quarter of 2026, subject to regulatory clearance. This initiative showcases IEX's dedication to unveiling a cutting-edge options exchange that caters to the requirements of market participants.
news.headline: IEX plans to launch IEX Options by Q1 2026, pending regulatory approval, showcasing commitment to innovation.

news.summary: Renowned musicians and close allies, who recently released the joint album "Who Believes In Angels?", have revealed their joint effort to provide essential HIV care and support. The Elton John AIDS Foundation and the Looking Out organization shared this initiative on April 16, 2025 in New York. This partnership aims to deliver life-saving services to individuals affected by HIV/AIDS. The artists involved have long-standing friendship and collaboration, and are working together to make a meaningful impact in the fight against HIV.
news.headline: Elton John AIDS Foundation and Brandi Carlile's Looking Out Foundation raise $1 million to protect HIV care globally.

news.summary: In a joint press release on April 16, 2025, SoundExchange and the National Association of Broadcasters revealed that they have reached a consensus on non-subscription rates for Commercial Broadcasters, along with other specifics related to royalty payments. This agreement comes before the upcoming Web VI session of the Copyright Royalty Board. This development marks an important step in establishing guidelines for royalty payments within the broadcasting industry.
news.headline: SoundExchange and NAB agree on non-subscription royalty rates for commercial broadcasters ahead of CRB hearings.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Oro, Inc. announced the launch of OroCommerce version 6.1. This new version became available on March 31 and is the latest long-term support (LTS) iteration of Oro's primary B2B eCommerce platform. OroCommerce 6.1 brings significant updates including the integration of practical artificial intelligence features, improved communication capabilities, and time-saving tools to enhance user experience.
news.headline: OroCommerce 6.1 launched by Oro, Inc. with AI for B2B sales. Available from March 31. Key features aimed at business efficiency.
